title: Assistant Store Manager - H&M India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - H&M India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with H&M India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About H&M India:
H&M India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H&M India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
